---
name: Runbook gap
about: A scenario you faced where the existing runbooks did not help
title: "[runbook] "
labels: documentation
---

## Scenario

What happened? What were you trying to do?

## Existing runbook(s) consulted

Which `docs/runbooks/*.md` did you read? Why did they not address your scenario?

## What you ended up doing

The actual recovery / mitigation path. Sanitise any real values.

## Suggested runbook addition

What should a future operator (or agent) read first when this happens again? A new runbook? An update to an existing one? An entry in `docs/runbooks/health-rules.md`?

## Additional context

Logs, references, related ADRs.
